api_token.description: ClickUp personal API token, sent raw (no Bearer prefix) in the Authorization header. Never logged.

base_url.description: ClickUp API base URL override for tests or proxies.

team_id.description: ClickUp team (workspace) id. Required for the 'spaces', 'tasks', 'goals', and 'webhooks' streams and the create_goal/create_space/create_webhook write actions.

space_id.description: ClickUp space id. Required for the 'folders', 'lists', and 'space_tags' streams and the create_folder write action.

list_id.description: ClickUp list id. Required for the create_task write action (tasks are created within a specific List).

folder_id.description: ClickUp folder id. Required for the create_list write action (Lists are created within a specific Folder).

include_archived.description: When 'true', include archived spaces/folders/lists/tasks (sent as archived=true instead of the default archived=false).

include_closed_tasks.description: When 'true', include closed tasks in the 'tasks' stream (sent as include_closed=true).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
